message:
feat(core): add distributed coordination module

Introduces distributed.rs for multi-instance coordination across
wezterm_automata deployments.

This module provides primitives for:
- Leader election among multiple wa instances
- Distributed locking for workspace operations
- State synchronization across machines
- Conflict resolution for concurrent modifications

The distributed module works with the sync module added previously,
enabling true multi-machine wezterm session management with
consistent state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
